win_condition: Most VP at journey's end wins
tiebreaker: Most achievement cards, then most coins remaining

categories.label: Sea Panorama VP
categories.description: VP from Sea panorama cards collected (1+2+3+4+5 = max 15)

categories.label: Mountain Panorama VP
categories.description: VP from Mountain panorama cards collected (1+2+3+4 = max 10)

categories.label: Paddy Panorama VP
categories.description: VP from Paddy panorama cards collected (1+2+3 = max 6)

categories.label: Temple Donation Bonus
categories.description: VP from temple majority scoring (10/7/4/2/1 by rank)

categories.label: Hot Springs VP
categories.description: VP from Hot Spring cards (2 or 3 each)

categories.label: Souvenir Set VP
categories.description: VP from souvenir sets (1/3/5/7 per set of 1/2/3/4 types)

categories.label: Meals
categories.description: 6 VP per meal eaten at inns

categories.label: Achievement Bonuses
categories.description: 3 VP each for leading Gourmet, Bather, Chatterbox, or Collector
